claimRewards().details: Rewards are paid from the contract's G$ balance. The balance must exceed      totalStaked to ensure reward payments never draw from validators' principal.      Rewards become claimable only when additional G$ (from protocol fees or      inflation) has been deposited above the staked amount.

initiateUnstake(uint256).details: Only one pending unbonding request allowed at a time.      Slashing can still apply to unbonding amounts during this period.

returns._0: uint256 Pending reward amount in G$

params.validator: Address of the validator to slash

params.amount: Amount of G$ to stake (must be >= MIN_STAKE)
params.name: Human-readable validator name

activeValidatorCount().notice: Get the number of currently active validators.

getUnbondingRequest(address).notice: Get unbonding request details for a validator.

initiateUnstake(uint256).notice: Initiate unstaking. Starts the 7-day unbonding clock.

meetsMinStake(uint256).notice: Check if amount meets minimum stake requirement

pendingRewards(address).notice: Calculate pending rewards for a validator.

slash(address,string).notice: Slash a validator. Applies to both staked AND unbonding amounts.         Slashed G$ goes to UBI pool.

stake(uint256,string,string).notice: Stake G$ to become a validator.

validatorCount().notice: Get the total number of validators (active and inactive).
